metadata.description: The subject is a male-presenting individual in their 30s with medium olive skin and a few faint freckles visible on the cheeks. Their face is oval-shaped with a defined jawline. The hair is short, dark brown, wavy, and styled back from a slightly receding hairline. The eyes are almond-shaped and a striking amber color, set widely apart. Thick, dark eyebrows are gently arched. The nose is straight with a slightly rounded tip. The mouth has medium-full lips, forming a gentle smile. A neatly trimmed, dark brown beard and mustache cover the lower face. The head is angled slightly to the right, with a pleasant, direct gaze.
